---
title: "nitrix.semiring.ell"
generated: true
signature-hash: 96a6dfac471c0017
description: "Semiring-generalised ELL-sparse matrix multiplication."
listing:
  id: nitrix-semiring-ell-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-semiring-ell/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.semiring.ell`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Semiring-generalised ELL-sparse matrix multiplication.

This module provides [`semiring_ell_matmul`](nitrix-semiring-ell/semiring_ell_matmul.qmd), which contracts a sparse
left operand held in ELL (ELLPACK) layout against a dense right operand
under an arbitrary semiring, together with its transpose companion
[`semiring_ell_rmatvec`](nitrix-semiring-ell/semiring_ell_rmatvec.qmd).  The forward [`semiring_ell_matmul`](nitrix-semiring-ell/semiring_ell_matmul.qmd)
dispatches across a three-level backend selection (auto, Pallas-CUDA, or
pure JAX); [`semiring_ell_rmatvec`](nitrix-semiring-ell/semiring_ell_rmatvec.qmd) is pure JAX.

The pad positions of each ELL row are expected to be filled with the
algebra's identity (for example `0` for the real semiring, or
$-\infty$ for the log semiring), so that padded entries contribute
nothing to the reduction.  See [`nitrix.sparse.ell.ell_pad`](nitrix-sparse-ell/ell_pad.qmd) for the
helper that produces such padding.

This is the central operator for brain-geometry workloads and the
load-bearing sparse kernel of the library.  The pure-JAX path is always
available; the Pallas-CUDA path is opt-in on supported hardware.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `kmax` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_cols` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ncol` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-semiring-ell-symbols}
:::
